fields.label: Package Name
fields.description: Display name for the package variant (e.g., '6-Pack', '24-Can Case')

fields.label: Package Code
fields.description: Unique identifier code for this package variant

fields.label: Product Master
fields.description: Parent product for this package variant

fields.label: Product Variant
fields.description: Specific product variant this package contains (optional)

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current status of the package variant

fields.label: Package Type
fields.options:
Single Unit
2-Pack
3-Pack
4-Pack
6-Pack
8-Pack
10-Pack
12-Pack
18-Pack
24-Pack
36-Pack
48-Pack
Case
Carton
Box
Pallet
Bulk
Custom
fields.description: Type of packaging configuration

fields.label: Units Per Package
fields.description: Number of individual units in this package

fields.label: Base UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for individual units (e.g., Piece, Can, Bottle)

fields.label: Package UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for the package (e.g., Pack, Case, Carton)

fields.label: Is Default Package
fields.description: Mark as the default package variant for this product

fields.label: Primary Barcode
fields.description: Main barcode (EAN/UPC) for this package

fields.label: Barcode Type
fields.options:
EAN-13
UPC-A
EAN-8
UPC-E
Code 128
Code 39
QR Code
ITF-14
GTIN-14
Other
fields.description: Type of the primary barcode

fields.label: Secondary Barcode
fields.description: Alternative barcode for this package (e.g., internal code)

fields.label: Secondary Barcode Type
fields.options:
EAN-13
UPC-A
EAN-8
UPC-E
Code 128
Code 39
QR Code
ITF-14
GTIN-14
Other
fields.description: Type of the secondary barcode

fields.label: Case/Carton Barcode
fields.description: Barcode for the outer case/carton packaging (ITF-14 recommended)

fields.label: Pallet Barcode
fields.description: Barcode for pallet-level shipping (SSCC-18 format)

fields.label: GTIN
fields.description: Global Trade Item Number

fields.label: Internal SKU
fields.description: Internal stock keeping unit code

fields.label: Package Price
fields.description: Selling price for this package

fields.label: Cost Price
fields.description: Cost price for this package

fields.label: MSRP
fields.description: Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price

fields.label: Price Per Unit
fields.description: Calculated price per individual unit

fields.label: Stock Quantity
fields.description: Current stock quantity of packages

fields.label: Minimum Order Quantity
fields.description: Minimum order quantity for this package

fields.label: Safety Stock
fields.description: Minimum stock level to maintain

fields.label: Lead Time (Days)
fields.description: Days required to replenish stock

fields.label: Gross Weight (kg)
fields.description: Total weight of the package including packaging

fields.label: Net Weight (kg)
fields.description: Weight of product contents only

fields.label: Tare Weight (kg)
fields.description: Calculated packaging weight (gross - net)

fields.label: Length (cm)
fields.description: Package length in centimeters

fields.label: Width (cm)
fields.description: Package width in centimeters

fields.label: Height (cm)
fields.description: Package height in centimeters

fields.label: Volume (cm3)
fields.description: Calculated volume (L x W x H)

fields.label: Desi (Volumetric Weight)
fields.description: Volumetric weight for shipping (L x W x H / 3000)

fields.label: Chargeable Weight (kg)
fields.description: Higher of gross weight or desi

fields.label: Units Per Layer
fields.description: Number of packages per pallet layer

fields.label: Layers Per Pallet
fields.description: Number of layers per pallet

fields.label: Package Image
fields.description: Primary image showing the package

fields.label: Package Description
fields.description: Description specific to this package variant

fields.label: Marketing Tagline
fields.description: Short promotional text for this package

fields.label: Package Benefits
fields.description: Key selling points for this package size

fields.label: Target Customer
fields.options:
Retail Consumer
Bulk Buyer
Wholesale
Foodservice
E-commerce
Institutional
Industrial
fields.description: Primary target customer for this package

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order for displaying packages on listings

fields.label: Media Files
fields.description: Additional images and media files for this package

fields.label: Available Channels
fields.description: Channels where this package is available

fields.label: Available for Sale
fields.description: Package is available for purchase

fields.label: Available Online
fields.description: Package can be sold through e-commerce

fields.label: Available In-Store
fields.description: Package can be sold in physical stores

fields.label: Available Wholesale
fields.description: Package can be sold to wholesale customers

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: Date from which this package is available

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: Date until which this package is available

fields.label: Is Seasonal
fields.description: Mark as seasonal/limited edition package

fields.label: Season
fields.description: Season or event this package is for (e.g., 'Holiday 2024')

fields.label: Launch Date
fields.description: Date the package was/will be launched

fields.label: Discontinue Date
fields.description: Date the package was/will be discontinued

fields.label: Replacement Package
fields.description: Package variant that replaces this one

fields.label: Discontinue Reason
fields.description: Reason for discontinuing this package

fields.label: Linked ERP Item
fields.description: Linked Item in ERPNext (auto-synced)

fields.label: Sync to ERP
fields.description: Enable automatic synchronization to ERPNext Item

fields.label: Last ERP Sync
fields.description: Timestamp of last synchronization to ERP

fields.label: Sync Status
fields.options:
Not Synced
Synced
Sync Failed
Pending
fields.description: Status of ERP synchronization

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this package variant (not exported)

fields.label: Packaging Instructions
fields.description: Special instructions for packaging this variant
